headline: Our Highest Conviction Call on Disney Points to $110 on Earnings Growth
summary: Disney (NYSE:DIS) has spent 2026 grinding sideways while the underlying business quietly accelerates. Shares are down 10.98% year to date, yet streaming margins just crossed double digits and FY26 EPS growth is guided at roughly 16%. That disconnect is the entire setup for our call. Our 24/7 Wall St. price target for Disney is $110.07, ... Our Highest Conviction Call on Disney Points to $110 on Earnings Growth
